(अ).— क犆灶ीय सरकार, िस猳ा िनमा榁ण अिधिनयम, 2011 (2011 का 11) क琉 धारा 24 क琉 उप-धारा (2) के खंड (घ) और (ड.) 獧ारा 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, िन玈िलिखत िनयम बनाती है, अथा榁तः— 1. संि楹玅 नाम और 灹ार瀓भ : संि楹玅 नाम और 灹ार瀓भ : संि楹玅 नाम और 灹ार瀓भ : संि楹玅 नाम और 灹ार瀓भ :---- (1) इन िनयम犘 का नाम “डॉ. एम.जी. रामच瀈灶न ज瀈म शता瀑दी”””” के अवसर पर 瀡मरणो瀄सव मनाने के िलए एक सौ 牱पये और पांच 牱पये के िस猳犘 का िनमा榁ण िनयम, 2017'' है । (2) ये राजप灴 म犆 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ牵 ह犘गे । 2. िस猳犘 का अं琈कत मू瀖य िस猳犘 का अं琈कत मू瀖य िस猳犘 का अं琈कत मू瀖य िस猳犘 का अं琈कत मू瀖य-- ““““डॉ. एम.जी. रामच瀈灶 डॉ. एम.जी. रामच瀈灶 डॉ. एम.जी. रामच瀈灶 डॉ. एम.जी. रामच瀈灶न ज瀈म न ज瀈म न ज瀈म न ज瀈म शता瀑दी शता瀑दी शता瀑दी शता瀑दी”””” के अवसर पर 瀡मरणो瀄सव मनाने के िलए के瀈灶ीय सरकार के 灹ािधकार के अधीन जारी करने के िलए टकसाल म犆 िन玈िलिखत अं琈कत मू瀖य के िस猳犘 का िनमा榁ण भी 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त :— (i) एक सौ 牱पये; RAMACHANDRA Dr. M.G. RAMACHANDRA Dr. M.G. RAMACHANDRA Dr. M.G. RAMACHANDRAN BIRTH CENTENARY" N BIRTH CENTENARY" N BIRTH CENTENARY" N BIRTH CENTENARY" उ瀄क琉琔ण榁त होगा। ड犒. एम.जी. रामच瀈灶न के िच灴 के नीचे अंतररा瀠灩ीय अंक犘 म犆 ''1917-2017'' अं琈कत होगा। दूसरी अनुसूची दूसरी अनुसूची दूसरी अनुसूची दूसरी अनुसूची (िनयम 5 देख犆) (िनयम 5 देख犆) (िनयम 5 देख犆) (िनयम 5 देख犆) िस猳े का अं琈कत मू瀖य मानक वजन अनुमत छूट संघटन म犆 मानक वजन म犆 (1) (2) (3) (4) एक सौ 牲पये 35 灡ाम रजत म犆 1/500वां िह瀡सा कम या अिधक अथा榁त रजत के अंश म犆 灹ित 1000 म犆 498 से 502 तक का अंतर हो सकेगा । 1/100वां जमा या घटा अथा榁त वजन 34.65 灡ाम से 35.35 灡ाम के बीच हो सकता है । पांच 牲पये 6 灡ाम तांबा और ज瀡ता के िलए 1/100वां िहस्सा कम या अिधक अथा榁त तांबा 74 灹ितशत से 76 灹ितशत और ज瀡ता म犆 19 灹ितशत से 21 灹ितशत तक हो सकता है तथा िनकल के िलए 1/200वां िह瀡सा कम या अिधक अथा榁त िनकल 4.5 灹ितशत से 5.5 灹ितशत तक हो सकता है। 1/40वां िह瀡सा कम या अिधक अथा榁त वजन 5.85 灡ाम से 6.15 灡ाम के बीच हो सकता है । [फा. सं. 02/22/2016-िस猳ा] ड犒. अिनल रंगा, िनदेशक -- 2 of 4 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th September, 2017 G.S.R. 1147(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (d) and (e) of sub-section (2) of Section 24 of the Coinage Act, 2011 (11 of 2011), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namely:— 1. Short title and commencement.- (1) These rules may be called the Coinage of One Hundred Rupees and Five Rupees coins to commemorate the occasion of Dr. M. G. Ramachandran Birth Centenary Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. Denomination of Coins.- The coins of the following denominations shall also be coined at the Mint for issue under the authority of the Central Government to commemorate the occasion of DR. M. G. RAMACHANDRAN BIRTH CENTENARY, namely:— (1) One Hundred Rupees; (2) Five Rupees. 3. Dimension and composition of coins.- The coins of the above denominations mentioned in rule 2 shall conform to the following dimensions and composition, namely:— Denomination of the coin Shape and outside diameter Number of Serrations Metal Composition (1) (2) (3) (4) One Hundred Rupees Circular 44 millimeter 200 Quaternary Alloy Silver - 50 Per cent Copper - 40 Per cent Nickel - 05 Per cent Zinc - 05 Per cent Five Rupees Circular 23 millimeter 100 Nickel Brass Copper - 75 Per cent Zinc - 20 Per cent Nickel - 05 Per cent 4. Design.- The design of the coins shall be as specified in the First Schedule to these rules. 5. Standard weight and remedy allowed. – The Standard weight of the coins of the One Hundred Rupees and Five Rupees coined to commemorate the occasion of Dr. M.G. Ramachandran Birth Centenary and the remedy allowed in making of such coins shall be as specified in the Second Schedule to these rules. First Schedule (See Rule 4) ONE HUNDRED RUPEES OBVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the centre with the legend “सयमेव जयते” inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word “ भारत ” in Devnagari script and on the right periphery with the word “INDIA” in English. It shall also bear the Rupee symbol “`” and denominational value “100” in International Numerals below the Lion Capitol. REVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the portrait of “Dr. M. G. RAMACHANDRAN” in the centre, with inscription "डॉ. एम. जी. रामचंन जम शताद" in Devnagari on upper periphery and "DR. M. G. RAMACHANDRAN BIRTH CENTENARY” in English on the lower periphery of the coin. The year “1917-2017” in international numeral shall be flanked below the portrait of Dr. M. G. Ramachandran. -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] FIVE RUPEES OBVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the centre with the legend “सयमेव जयते” inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word “ भारत ” in Devnagari script and on the right periphery with the word “INDIA” in English. It shall also bear the Rupee symbol “`” and denominational value “5” in International Numerals below the Lion Capitol. REVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the portrait of “Dr. M. G. RAMACHANDRAN” in the centre, with inscription "डॉ. एम. जी. रामचंन जम शताद" in Devnagari on upper periphery and "DR. M. G. RAMACHANDRAN BIRTH CENTENARY” in English on the lower periphery of the coin. The year “1917-2017” in international numeral shall be flanked below the portrait of Dr. M. G. Ramachandran. Second Schedule (See Rule 5) Denomination of coin Standard Weight Remedy Allowed In composition In Standard Weight (1) (2) (3) (4) One Hundred Rupees 35 grams 1/500th plus or minus for silver, that is to say the Silver content may vary from 498 to 502 per 1000. 1/100th plus or minus that is to say weight could vary 34.65 grams to 35.35 grams. Five Rupees 6 grams 1/100th plus or minus for Copper and Zinc, that is to say Copper could vary from 74 per cent to 76 per cent and Zinc from 19 per cent to 21 per cent and 1/200th plus and minus for Nickel that is to say Nickel could vary from 4.5 per cent to 5.5 per cent. 1/40th plus or minus, that is to say, the weight could vary from 5.85grams to 6.15 grams. [F. No. 02/22/2016 – Coin] Dr. Anil Ranga, Director Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 4 of 4 --
